title: RBI keeps repo rate unchanged as food inflation remains sticky
description: India's central bank held its key policy rate steady and said inflation risks need close monitoring.
content: The Reserve Bank of India kept policy unchanged, pointing to uneven food inflation and global uncertainty.

title: Oil rises after Red Sea shipping disruption renews supply fears
description: Energy traders watched shipping routes after fresh disruption in a key corridor raised transport risk.
content: Crude prices moved higher as traders assessed possible rerouting costs and insurance premiums.

title: ECB signals cautious policy path after services inflation surprise
description: European policymakers suggested rate cuts may be slower if wage and service prices stay firm.
content: The European Central Bank said incoming inflation data would guide future policy decisions.

title: US Treasury yields edge higher as Fed officials stress patience
description: Bond yields rose after Federal Reserve officials said inflation progress needs confirmation.
content: Markets reduced bets on rapid rate cuts as investors processed cautious central bank comments.

title: China exports rebound but weak domestic demand weighs on outlook
description: China reported stronger exports while household demand remained uneven across major cities.
content: The trade data pointed to external strength but persistent pressure inside the domestic economy.

title: Indian parliament debates fuel tax relief as transport costs climb
description: Lawmakers discussed temporary relief measures after higher fuel costs affected logistics and consumers.
content: Policy watchers said any tax adjustment could affect state revenues and household transport bills.

title: Copper inventories fall as manufacturers warn of supply-chain delays
description: Industrial metal inventories tightened, raising concerns for electronics and electric vehicle inputs.
content: Manufacturers said delivery timelines could lengthen if warehouse stocks continue to draw down.

title: Ukraine grain corridor uncertainty lifts wheat prices
description: Export concerns around Black Sea routes pushed wheat futures higher in early trading.
content: Food importers monitored shipping risk after fresh uncertainty around grain corridor flows.

title: Japan yen strengthens after Bank of Japan hints at gradual tightening
description: The yen gained as policymakers signaled they could adjust rates if wage growth continues.
content: Currency markets reacted to comments suggesting Japan may slowly move away from ultra-loose policy.

title: Global shipping costs rise as insurers reprice conflict risk
description: Freight and insurance costs increased across routes exposed to geopolitical tensions.
content: Analysts said higher transport costs could feed into import prices if disruptions persist.
